'''Sawthawne''' was a [[Lutrillian/Legends|Lutrillian]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] who operated out of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. He was the unofficial "boss of [[Port Town (Cloud City)/Legends|port town]]" on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. He was also controlling a deserted part of [[Tibannopolis]]. Sawthawne had the odd habit of wearing antique optical [[spectacles]]. Despite his bookish appearance and feeble physique, he was a brilliant organizer who surrounded himself with a cadre of trained killers. Sawthawne had his fingers in [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], and protection rackets, and [[Scoundrel/Legends|scoundrels]] came from all over the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] to land jobs with Sawthawne. He was the owner of the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] [[Best Chance (yacht)|''Best Chance'']].
